name: Monet 2.0
description: 水彩画室。玫瑰与暮紫的晕染,暮色花园暗色模式。
author: Forsion

background.light: radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 50% at 20% 20%, rgba(244,114,182,0.35), transparent 55%), radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 50% at 85% 30%, rgba(168,85,247,0.28), transparent 55%), radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 60% at 50% 100%, rgba(251,146,160,0.3), transparent 60%), linear-gradient(180deg, #fbf2f5 0%, #f5ebf2 100%)
background.dark: radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 60% at 20% 10%, rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.18), transparent 60%), radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 50% at 85% 30%, rgba(244, 114, 182, 0.14), transparent 55%), radial-gradient(ellipse 90% 70% at 50% 100%, rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.16), transparent 60%), linear-gradient(180deg, #1a1328 0%, #100a1c 100%)

preview.tagline: 水彩画室。玫瑰与暮紫的晕染,暮色花园暗色模式。
